source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Expedition-grade product UI typography with crisp numerals and Japanese guidance tuned for route planning, elevation data, and exploration workflows.
layout: Vertical 8px grids, stacked navigation, terraced card groups, cliff-edge dividers, compact route tables, and limestone striation texture.

prompts.label: Transparent karst towers motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Karst transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a karst towers landscape motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact limestone valley motif with steep vertical karst towers, weathered limestone grey cliffs, jungle-green vegetation clinging to ledges, mist ribbons in valley gaps, subtle cave openings and eroded flutes. It should feel like a vertical exploration system: ascent routes, stacked levels, depth, and navigable cliff terraces, but still a natural landscape motif rather than a UI screen.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full tower cluster and valley base without cropping. Natural overcast studio-like lighting that preserves limestone texture and mist; no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no buildings, no people, no bridges, no fantasy castles, no floating islands, no text, no watermark, no map labels, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or magenta in the subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Karst light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Karst", derived from a limestone valley with vertical karst towers. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible vertical exploration system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 4K-class design board, target 3840 x 2160, clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Karst, Karst, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from limestone grey cliffs, jungle green vegetation, pale mist, eroded cave openings, terrace paths, vertical ascent, and layered valley depth. The board must read as karst towers in a limestone valley, not generic mountain tourism or sci-fi.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Expedition Notes. Keep text short, crisp, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, route progress chart, vertical bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple ascent/path icons.
Style: vertical exploration system, shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, 8px radius, pale limestone backgrounds, deep jungle primary actions, misty muted panels, cliff-grey borders, cave-ink text, moss accent states, precise grid, subtle limestone grain and vertical striation texture, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Mist Basin, Cave Ink, Jungle Canopy, Limestone Face, Fog Veil, Moss Path, Wet Stone, Cliff Shadow, Lichen Signal.
Constraints: no buildings, no people, no travel ads, no fantasy castles, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Karst", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Karst dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Karst". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from limestone valley karst towers, jungle vegetation, mist, and cave openings.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 4K-class design board, target 3840 x 2160, clean professional UI design-system presentation with large readable labels.
Required visible sections: Morphous Karst, Karst, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve limestone grey highlights, jungle green active states, pale mist surfaces, wet stone borders, dark cave-ink backgrounds, eroded vertical striation texture, terrace-route progress, and layered valley depth. Must read as karst towers in a limestone valley, not generic mountain tourism or sci-fi.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Expedition Notes. Keep text short, crisp, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, route progress chart, vertical bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple ascent/path icons.
Visual details: cave-ink and cliff-shadow dark backgrounds, limestone-face cards, fog-veil foreground text, jungle-canopy primary buttons, moss path charts, lichen signal notices, wet-stone borders, subtle mist and limestone grain, 8px radius, accessible contrast.
Palette names to show: Mist Basin, Cave Ink, Jungle Canopy, Limestone Face, Fog Veil, Moss Path, Wet Stone, Cliff Shadow, Lichen Signal.
Constraints: no buildings, no people, no travel ads, no fantasy castles, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Karst", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
